name: Black Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 3-4 ears corn, cooked and cut off the cob
1-3 bell peppers, preferably yellow or red, chopped
Juice and grated rind of 1 orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 3 cups of soaked black beans until tender.
2. Cook and cut off ears of corn from 3-4 ears (next time frozen corn will be used).
3. Chop 1-3 yellow or red bell peppers, preferably fresh.
4. Mix together juice and grated rind from 1 orange, balsamic vinegar, and herbs/spices.
5. Combine cooked beans, corn, chopped peppers, and dressing in a bowl to mix.
6. Let salad sit for flavors to meld (at least an hour).
7. Serve chilled as a salad or reheat over rice.
This recipe makes a large batch that can be used for potlucks throughout the year. The balsamic vinegar amount was not measured, just added by taste - at least 1/4 cup but possibly more. Various herbs and spices like fresh ginger, thyme, rosemary have been used to season.
